name: measuredServicePDURef
title: measuredServicePDURef
description: References a service PDU measurement point, which means measuring a specific connection between consumer and provider for a service PDU.
Not used for PDUs outside services, the data type of these is measuredPDURef.

parameters.name: PDU
parameters.description: PDU, determining the data type of the object.

row: Name Name of the measurement endpoint
Path Full path of the measurement endpoint (including namespaces)
ConsumerIndex Index of the consumer. Note that the index may change if consumers are added or removed.
ProviderIndex Index of the provider. Note that the index may change if providers are added or removed.
measuredService The measurement point at the service.
SubscriptionState State of the PDU subscription: Unknown: the PDUsubscription was not observed yet Unsubscribed: the PDU is not subscribed Subscribed: the PDU is subscribed
